item.title: 基础模型提供商
item.summary: 以基础模型能力为核心供给的产业范式。

updates.event: The MiniCPM deployment on Samsung's Galaxy Z Fold8 series marks the first time a Chinese-made on-device LLM has entered a leading international smartphone vendor's global flagship product line.

evidence.source_quote: 这是国产端侧大模型首次进入国际头部手机厂商的全球旗舰产品线。

updates.event: Hugging Face 发布 The Stack v3 代码训练数据集，规模约为 5 万亿 token。

evidence.source_quote: Hugging Face has released The Stack v3, a code training dataset containing approximately 5 trillion tokens and 120 TB of raw data

updates.event: Five companies account for 23 of the 24 most frequently evaluated AI systems in EveryEvalEver, indicating a bias toward U.S. commercial models.

evidence.source_quote: The data also showed a bias toward U.S. commercial models, with five companies accounting for 23 of the 24 most frequently evaluated AI systems.

facts.statement: The MiniCPM deployment on Samsung's Galaxy Z Fold8 series marks the first time a Chinese-made on-device LLM has entered a leading international smartphone vendor's global flagship product line.
facts.value: First Chinese on-device LLM in a leading international smartphone vendor's global flagship product line

facts.statement: Hugging Face 发布 The Stack v3 代码训练数据集，规模约为 5 万亿 token。
Five companies account for 23 of the 24 most frequently evaluated AI systems in EveryEvalEver, indicating a bias toward U.S. commercial models.

item.html:
已积累 41 条可追溯记录；以下仅展示最近24小时中最值得战略关注的更新。

The MiniCPM deployment on Samsung's Galaxy Z Fold8 series marks the first time a Chinese-made on-device LLM has entered a leading international smartphone vendor's global flagship product line.
